name: Apollomon

signature_move.name: Solblaster
signature_move.description: Fires the scorching solar orb generated from the sphere of flames on its back.

description: A God Man Digimon that is one of the Olympos XII , it conceals solar-class flame energy. This energy has the terrifying power to smelt all substances, and its almost heartless fervor and pride are barely restrained. Its Special Moves are firing the scorching solar orb generated from the sphere of flame on its back ( Sol blaster ), and a one-hit knockout fist filled with its hidden power ( Phoebus Blow ). Also, it can continuously fire red hot arrows from the shining jewels on its hands ( Arrow of Apollo ).
